title: Entity Item Tooltips
description: Add extra information to the tooltips for entity spawning items.
body:
A client-side mod to add extra tooltip information to entity spawning items. This will generally affect spawn eggs, mob buckets, and similar items. This mod does not modify textures or change item data.

The extended tooltip information includes:
- Mob Variants (ex. Axolotl, Cat, Chicken, Panda, Parrot)
- Mob Colors (ex. Shulkers, Sheep, Wolf Collars)
- Mob Size (ex. Phantom, Salmon, Slime)
- Invisibility (ex. Item Frames, Armor Stands)
- And more!

Fully Compatible with the [Pouches](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-pouches) Mod

With explicit support for mobs from:
- [Cluckshrooms](https://modrinth.com/mod/cluckshrooms)
- [Muddy Pigs](https://modrinth.com/project/muddy-pigs-mod)
- [Sunken Skeletons](https://modrinth.com/mod/sunken-skeletons)

Ukranian translations courtesy of [StarmanMine142](https://modrinth.com/user/StarmanMine142)
